category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Chiko as a gRPC client on the terminal.
source_facts.description says Chiko is a gRPC client for the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README quick start uses the display name Chiko.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/felangga/chiko, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
